description: In post communist Yugoslavia, Yugo Ciao was the second fastest way into 'new' car ownership. Fastest way was the then 30 year old Zastava 101. Despite being called Ciao, Yugo finally bowed out 8 years later in 2008 when Zastava completely shut down car production and the plant in Krajugevac was sold to Fiat, now Stellantis.
creator: Connor
